title: coussarea penetantha
intro: Coussarea penetantha, also known as the "Sapucaia", is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coussarea penetantha include relief from bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
